dashboard.label: SQL Server Fleet — Security View
dashboard.description: Authentication and access events for the SQL Server fleet. Event-driven; no SQL Audit / Extended Events / DB Connect required. Reliable signal: 18456 (failed login). Optional: 18453/18454 if "audit successful logins" is enabled at the SQL instance level.

search.query: eventtype=sql_engine_events EventCode IN (18456,18452,18453,18454) | eval host=lower(coalesce(ComputerName,host)) | lookup sql_inventory_lookup host OUTPUT env role ag_cluster owner tier | where isnotnull(env) | search $env_tok$ | rex field=Message "(?i)Login failed for user '(?<login_user>[^']+)'" | rex field=Message "(?i)Login succeeded for user '(?<login_user_ok>[^']+)'" | rex field=Message "(?i)Reason:\s*(?<reason>[^.\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "(?i)CLIENT:\s*\[?(?<client_ip>[0-9a-fA-F\.\:]+)\]?" | eval login_user=coalesce(login_user,login_user_ok) | eval is_failed=if(EventCode IN (18456,18452),1,0) | eval is_success=if(EventCode IN (18453,18454),1,0) | eval is_sa=if(lower(login_user)=="sa",1,0) | eval hour_local=tonumber(strftime(_time,"%H")) | eval offhours=if(hour_local<tonumber("$biz_start$") OR hour_local>=tonumber("$biz_end$"),1,0)
where is_failed=1 | stats dc(client_ip) as ips
where is_success=1 AND offhours=1 | stats count
where is_failed=1 | stats dc(host) as h

single.option: distinct SQL hosts with failed logins

search.query: where is_failed=1 | stats count dc(login_user) as users dc(host) as targets latest(_time) as last_seen by client_ip | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - count | rename client_ip as "Client IP" count as Attempts users as "Users Tried" targets as "Hosts Hit" last_seen as "Last Seen" | head 25

where is_failed=1 | stats count dc(client_ip) as ips dc(host) as hosts latest(_time) as last_seen by login_user | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - count | rename login_user as Login count as Attempts ips as "Source IPs" hosts as "Hosts Targeted" last_seen as "Last Seen" | head 25
where is_failed=1 | eval reason=if(isnull(reason) OR reason="","(unparsed)",reason) | stats count by reason | sort - count
where is_failed=1 | timechart span=30m count by env

panel.title: Brute-Force Candidates (≥10 fails / 5 min from one IP)

search.query: where is_failed=1 | bin _time span=5m | stats count by _time client_ip host env | where count >= 10 | eval window=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | sort - _time | fields window client_ip host env count | rename window as "5-min Window" client_ip as "Client IP" host as Host env as Env count as Fails | head 25

where is_sa=1 | eval result=if(is_success=1,"SUCCESS","FAIL") | table _time host env client_ip result reason | rename _time as Time host as Host env as Env client_ip as "Client IP" result as Result reason as Reason | sort - Time

panel.title: Off-Hours Successful Logins (requires SQL audit-success enabled)

search.query: where is_success=1 AND offhours=1 | table _time host env login_user client_ip hour_local | rename _time as Time host as Host env as Env login_user as Login client_ip as "Client IP" hour_local as "Hour" | sort - Time
where is_failed=1 | eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H") | chart count over host by hour
